notes:
# ATSYS — Release Notes
### QR Attendance System  •  ATH Studios  •  April 2026

---

## v3.6.6 — Google Drive Auth Reminder

### ✨ New Feature

- **Startup auth check** — the app silently inspects your Google Drive token 4 seconds after launch, no browser opened
- **Warning banner** — if your authorisation is missing or expired, a persistent orange banner appears at the top of the app
- **One-click fix** — a dialog lets you re-authorise immediately; success swaps the banner to a green confirmation automatically
- **Non-intrusive** — choosing *Remind Me Later* closes the dialog but keeps the banner visible so it's never forgotten

---

## v3.6.5 — Update System Fixes

### 🐛 Bug Fixes

- **Process kill before copy** — updater now runs `taskkill` and confirms the old `ATSYS.exe` is fully gone before touching any files; previously a blind 5-second timeout was used which failed on slow machines
- **`_internal` folder fix** — DLLs and support files now always land in the correct `_internal\` folder; the updater auto-detects flat and nested ZIP layouts and picks the right source
- **Old files purged** — switched from `robocopy /E` to `/MIR` so leftover files from the previous version are deleted, not just overwritten
- **Step-by-step progress** — updater console now shows Step 0–5 labels so teachers can see exactly what is happening during install

---

## v3.6.4 — Shortcut & Cleanup Fixes

### 🐛 Bug Fixes

- **Desktop shortcut replaced on every update** — the shortcut sentinel file is now deleted before relaunch, forcing the app to recreate the `.lnk` pointing to the new exe
- **Dead code removed** — orphaned function body with no `def` statement has been restored correctly

---
